videos.title: Jeep Wheels - Steel vs Alloy. Beadlock vs Non. We're Going There!
videos.description:
Steel vs alloy. Beadlock vs non. 
Two dudes. Zero diplomacy. 
Let's go.

#JeepLife #AlloyWheels #Beadlock

Paul and The Ginger walk straight into one of the most argued about topics in Jeep culture and refuse to apologize for their opinions.

Wheels. The decision every Jeep owner spends way too much time on, way too much money on, and way too much time defending on the internet afterward.
And for good reason...because it actually matters.
